text:
Findings of the court

On [date and time], [name of judge] considered the application of the applicant for a final third party order.

On [date], [name of judge] made an order under case number [case number] requiring the respondent to pay money to the applicant.

The amount now owing under that order is £[amount] including interest and costs as follows:

There is a debt due or accruing due by the third party to the respondent.

IT IS ORDERED THAT:

The third party pay to the applicant the sum of £[amount] by 4pm on [date].

The applicant’s costs of this application, [summarily assessed at £[amount] (inclusive of VAT and disbursements)] / [to be subject to detailed assessment on the [standard] / [indemnity] basis if not agreed by [date and time]], are to be retained out of the money recovered by the applicant under this order in priority to the sums remaining due under the order of [name of judge] under case number [case number].

The amount owed by the third party to the respondent will be reduced by:

what the third party pays under this order; and

any costs and expenses to which the third party is entitled.

The amount owed by the respondent to the applicant will be reduced by what the third party pays under this order less the applicant’s costs of the application.

Dated [date]

Sums remaining due for payment under the order | £[amount]

Interest to the date of the order | £[amount]

Costs to the date of the order | £[amount]

metadata.source: Standard Family Orders — Volume 1: Financial Remedies (May 2026)
